inputs.text: Bachha 5 saal ka hai, bahut rota hai, bukhar bahut tezi se chadha hai, sir dard kar raha hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Acute onset of high fever and severe headache

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Common cause of fever and headache in children

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely without other symptoms, but cannot be ruled out

inputs.text: Bachha ko aankhon ke peeche dard ho raha hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain, bukhar abhi bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain and bone pain are characteristic symptoms

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Still possible, but less likely with these new symptoms

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely with these specific symptoms

inputs.text: Bachha ko bukhar kam ho gaya hai, lal daane nikal aaye hain, masoodon se khoon aa raha hai
inputs.image_desc: pale appearance, dark circles under eyes

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Characteristic rash and bleeding gums confirm Dengue

inputs.text: Bachha ab thoda behtar hai, lekin abhi bhi bahut kamzor hai, doctor ne blood test kiya hai
inputs.image_desc: prescription and blood test report shown

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Blood test results confirm Dengue, and patient is recovering

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out by blood test results

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out by blood test results
